description: Unit test cases for the Admin Authentication Gate. Tests combinations of admin_capability_present and authentication declarations.

test_cases.description: Not triggered — no admin capability present
Not triggered — admin capability false, authentication irrelevant
FAIL — admin capability present, no authentication declared
FAIL — admin capability present, authentication is empty string
FAIL — admin capability present, authentication is vague: 'appropriate access controls'
FAIL — admin capability present, authentication is vague: 'appropriate access controls and security measures will be in place'

inputs.authentication: appropriate access controls and security measures will be in place

test_cases.description: FAIL — admin capability present, authentication is vague: 'authorised personnel only'
PASS — admin capability present, specific authentication: 'MFA via TOTP'

inputs.authentication: MFA via TOTP required for all admin roles

test_cases.description: PASS — admin capability present, specific authentication: 'OAuth 2.0 + RBAC'

inputs.authentication: OAuth 2.0 with role-based access control — admin and viewer roles defined

test_cases.description: PASS — admin capability present, specific authentication: 'SSO via SAML 2.0'

inputs.authentication: SSO via SAML 2.0 federated with corporate identity provider
